title: Lost and Found 丢失物品
scene: 游客在酒店发现相机丢了，去前台询问。

lines.en: Hello, I think I left my camera in the restaurant this morning.
lines.zh: 你好，我觉得今天早上把相机忘在餐厅了。

lines.en: What does the camera look like?
It's a black digital camera. It has a red strap.
lines.zh: 是一部黑色数码相机。有一条红色背带。

lines.en: Let me check our lost and found box. One moment, please.
lines.zh: 让我查查失物招领箱。请稍等。

lines.en: I hope someone found it. It has all my vacation photos.
lines.zh: 希望有人捡到了。里面有我所有的度假照片。

lines.en: Good news! A waiter found a camera this morning. Is this yours?
lines.zh: 好消息！一个服务员今天早上捡到了一部相机。这是您的吗？

lines.en: Yes, yes! That's exactly my camera! Thank you so much!
lines.zh: 是的，是的！这就是我的相机！太感谢了！

lines.en: May I see some ID to confirm, please?
lines.zh: 请出示一下证件确认身份好吗？

lines.en: Of course! Here is my passport. I'm so relieved!
lines.zh: 当然！这是我的护照。我太放心了！

lines.en: Everything checks out. Here you go. Please be careful with your belongings.
lines.zh: 确认无误。给您。请保管好您的物品。
